_readme: Personalised outreach pages at /for/[slug]/. Noindexed + robots-blocked, never in sitemap. Add one entry per Loom teardown prospect (see outreach/loom-teardown-campaign.md). Pages 404 after expires date. loomUrl and graderScore are optional. Keep the demo entry: it is the template and doubles as a preview at /for/demo/.

fixes.title: Your homepage title tag wastes the local query
fixes.detail: It reads 'Home | Demo Dental Practice'. Searchers and Google both need 'Dentist in Reading' in there. This is a 10-minute change that directly targets the query you are position 8 for.

fixes.title: No LocalBusiness schema, so the local pack ignores you
fixes.detail: Competitors above you all mark up name, address, opening hours and reviews. Without it you are invisible to the map results that take most of the clicks for 'dentist reading'.
